rationale: No new qualitative developments in the Ukraine war or Black Sea security; Iran deal uncertainty continues to affect energy costs relevant to Romania.

top_events.title: Iran claims deal with US near, Israel strikes Lebanon
top_events.summary: Unresolved US-Iran deal keeps energy price uncertainty alive for Romania; continued Israeli strikes on Lebanon add regional instability but no direct Black Sea impact.

top_events.title: Violence erupts at anti-government protest in DR Congo
top_events.summary: Distant African instability with no direct relevance to Romania's security or economy.

top_events.title: Switzerland to vote on plan to cap population at 10 million
top_events.summary: Swiss referendum on population cap is a minor EU-adjacent political development; minimal direct impact on Romania.
